title: Hypertension Management in the Caribbean
description: This course provides Caribbean pharmacy technicians with the essential knowledge and skills to effectively manage hypertension, a leading cause of morbidity and mortality across the region. Drawing insights from specific islands like Jamaica, Trinidad & Tobago, Barbados, Guyana, and Belize, the course explores the unique challenges and best practices in hypertension care within the Caribbean context.
what_youll_learn: Identify the key factors contributing to the high prevalence of hypertension in the Caribbean region
Describe the drug scheduling and formulary differences across CARICOM nations and their impact on hypertension management
Develop strategies to address common supply chain challenges and ensure the consistent availability of antihypertensive medications
Recognize the potential interactions between traditional Caribbean herbal remedies and conventional hypertension treatments
Demonstrate effective patient education and counseling techniques to improve medication adherence and self-management of hypertension
